description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a hip roof and a combination of light gray and dark gray exterior finishes. The front facade features large, vertically aligned windows that allow ample natural light into the main living spaces. A prominent balcony with a blue railing extends from the left side of the upper floor, supported by a single column. The rear of the house includes a wide covered patio area, providing sheltered outdoor space. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the sides, with a mix of single and double panes, and the roof is finished with dark, textured shingles. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large vertical windows, a front balcony, and a covered rear patio. The exterior is finished in light and dark gray tones with a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: The front view shows large vertical windows, a prominent balcony on the left, and the main entrance area beneath the balcony.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the plain wall with a few windows and the side of the balcony, showing minimal architectural detail.
description_view_2: The rear view features a wide covered patio, a central window above the patio roof, and symmetrical window placement on both floors.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the side of the balcony, several windows, and the supporting column beneath the balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large vertical windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway beneath the balcony, featuring a covered porch area and large glass doors.
